1.prompt: Well, it seems that the operation has been a success so far! Unfortunately, I’ve taken 99% of your pay, since I have to pay off a loan. Really must suck being you! But the good news is that you’ll stay working here for the foreseeable future since it’s not like you’d ever be able to afford to live anywhere but in the company confines anyway. Also, I caught onto your little scheme to butter up the customers and marry one of them to escape, that won’t be working in the future. If I catch you doing that again I’ll just blacklist them from coming back, there's no hope for you to escape now.
